name: inventory-management
description: Inventory Management & Stock Movement System — SV Enterprises

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.db:init: docker exec inventory-mongodb mongosh -u inventory -p inventory_local --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "try { rs.status() } catch (e) { rs.initiate({_id:'rs0',members:[{_id:0,host:'localhost:27017'}]}) }"
